items.title: Star Wars Millennium Falcon Retro May The 4th Be With You T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: star, wars, millennium, falcon, may, 4th, you. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: teeunion, tuxedo, party, concert, festival, costume. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
